nasb.text: When you shall eat of the fruit of your hands, You will be happy and it will be well with you.

esv.text: You shall eat the fruit of the labor of your hands; you shall be blessed, and it shall be well with you.

cnv.text: 你必吃你親手勞碌得來的， 你必享福，事事順利。

ccb.text: 你必享受自己的劳动成果， 得到祝福，行事亨通。

csbs.text: 你必然吃到你手辛苦得来的， 你必蒙福，事事顺利！
